name: saved-query-catalog
description: Example declarative extension that scaffolds a saved-query catalog as Markdown notes using supported metadata, widgets, transforms, and the outline-board view.

permissions.reason: Reads metadata already derived from local Markdown notes for saved-query catalog grouping and review.
Writes bounded catalog scaffolding, heading cleanup, and sorted criteria lists into the current note when requested.

contributes.label: Saved query catalog metadata
contributes.description: Declares supported fields that help agents document saved searches, review queues, and dashboard notes without executing a query language.

contributes.label: Tags
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported tag sidebar widget for catalog filters and grouping tags.

contributes.label: Properties
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported frontmatter widget for query catalog ownership, status, and criteria fields.

contributes.label: Tasks
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported task widget for follow-up work linked to saved query definitions.

contributes.label: Outline board
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported outline-board view as a safe catalog and dashboard scaffold.

contributes.label: Append saved-query catalog scaffold
contributes.description: Declares the validator-supported append-template transform for adding catalog sections to a note.

contributes.label: Normalize catalog headings
contributes.description: Declares the supported heading cleanup transform for catalog notes.

contributes.label: Sort catalog criteria lines
contributes.description: Declares the supported line sorting transform for criteria and result-review lists.
